speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 여기 봐, 주무. 밤인데 편의점이 별처럼 빛나.
action: Mochi notices the glowing Korean convenience store sign in the rain.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 와아, 간판에 작은 별이 숨어 있어!
action: Cut toward the sign and warm star bulbs above the store.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 비 냄새도 나고, 따뜻한 우유 냄새도 나.
action: Mochi sniffs the warm air at the doorway, chest star glowing softly.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 그럼 조심히 들어가 보자. 내 꼬리빛은 약하게 켤게.
action: Zumu floats closer with a dim blue comet tail.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 잠깐, 문 위에서 뭔가 반짝였어.
action: Mochi looks up at the automatic door sensor.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 센서야. 그런데 오늘은 별가루를 먹은 것 같아.
action: Zumu circles the sensor as gold dust flickers.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 문아, 우리를 놀라게 하지 말아 줘.
action: Mochi raises a paw toward the door, asking gently.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 괜찮아, 내가 먼저 살짝 날아가 볼게.
action: Zumu flies forward past the glass door.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 앗! 별조각들이 컵라면 쪽으로 도망가!
action: Mochi reacts as star pieces bounce toward ramyeon shelves.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 잡자! 하지만 진열대는 건드리지 않기!
action: Zumu leads the chase without knocking products down.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 바닥이 미끄러워. 천천히 가야 해.
action: Mochi slows down on the shiny wet floor.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 좋아, 속도 줄일게. 반짝임만 따라와.
action: Zumu makes a slower blue trail.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 저 작은 별은 왜 떨고 있을까?
action: Mochi sees a tiny star trembling near the door.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 너무 밝은 불빛이 무서웠나 봐.
action: Zumu lowers his body and tail light, trying not to scare it.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 괜찮아. 우리는 기다릴 수 있어.
action: Mochi breathes gently, small lights gathering around his cheeks and chest.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 내 꼬리빛도 작게 만들게. 이렇게.
action: Zumu demonstrates a smaller, softer comet tail.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 봐, 조금씩 다시 빛나고 있어.
action: The tiny star glows again while Mochi watches softly.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 좋아. 이제 별들이 줄을 서면 문을 통과할 수 있어.
action: Zumu points the star pieces toward the automatic door path.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 문이 열릴 때마다 바람이 살짝 불어.
action: Mochi notices the air rhythm from the sliding door.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 그 바람을 박자로 쓰자. 하나, 둘, 반짝!
action: Zumu turns the door rhythm into a little game.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 작은 별들아, 너무 서두르지 마.
action: Mochi speaks softly to the tiny star pieces.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 내 푸른 길 위로 천천히 오면 돼.
action: Zumu paints a blue glowing path in the air.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 밖은 차갑지만, 여기 빛은 따뜻해.
action: Cutaway to warm store light and cold rain outside.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 그래서 별들이 길을 잃지 않는 거야.
action: The sign star reflects on the wet pavement like a guide.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 마지막 별이 라면 기계 뒤에 숨어 있어.
action: Mochi spots the last star near the hot water machine.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 뜨거운 물 소리가 커서 놀랐나 봐.
action: Zumu understands why the little star hid.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 내 손 위에 앉아도 괜찮아. 아주 천천히.
action: Mochi offers his paw, surrounded by small warm lights.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 모치 손은 따뜻해. 나도 옆에서 지켜볼게.
action: Zumu stays beside Mochi, calm and protective.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 이제 모두 함께 나갈 준비 됐어?
action: Mochi looks to the group of star pieces near the door.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 응! 파란 길을 만들게. 반짝반짝, 따라와!
action: Zumu creates the final blue light road outside.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 문이 열린다. 하나씩, 조심조심.
action: The automatic door opens and Mochi counts the stars out.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 좋아! 모두 밤하늘 쪽으로 올라가고 있어!
action: Zumu watches the star pieces rise into the rainy night.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 간판의 별도 더 환해졌어.
action: The store sign star glows brighter.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 오늘 편의점은 별들의 정류장이었네.
action: Wide warm shot of the store as the rain calms.

speaker: Mochi
text_ko: 주무, 내일도 같이 반짝임을 찾아볼까?
action: Mochi smiles softly with small lights around him.

speaker: Zumu
text_ko: 당연하지. 모치랑 가면 길이 무섭지 않아.
action: Zumu smiles back as the final star dust fades.
